epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Clinical diagnosis per EULAR/ACR criteria: pain, stiffness, and radiographic evidence (Kellgren-Lawrence grade ≥2)

publicHealthSystem.screeningCoverage: No routine screening; opportunistic via primary care
publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Symptom management in 60-70% of diagnosed cases

regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Non-pharmacological (exercise, weight loss) first-line; NSAIDs, intra-articular injections, joint replacement per EULAR guidelines
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Heterogeneous access across member states; rising costs from aging demographics
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Standardized EULAR guidelines; advanced orthopedic services in Western EU
